level_note: หมายเหตุ (printed below the plan): ระดับพื้นห้องน้ำ WC.1 = +0.50 ม., ระดับพื้นห้องน้ำ WC.2 = +3.65 ม.
warnings: This 1:25 sheet (A-16) shows ONE plan drawing labeled 'แปลนห้องน้ำ WC.1, WC.2' used for both bathrooms since they share an identical layout (mirror-image between the ground floor WC.1 and 2nd floor WC.2) — only the floor level differs (+0.50 for WC.1, +3.65 for WC.2, per the printed note), confirmed consistent with the floor plan sheets (หน้า06/07) and the section sheets on this same detail (_หน้า19_wc_section1.json / _หน้า19_wc_section2.json).

This room corresponds to 'ห้องน้ำ' on the ground-floor plan (หน้า06, near grid3 x gridD-C) and 'ห้องน้ำ' on the 2nd-floor plan (หน้า07, same grid position) — this sheet is the scaled 1:25 detail superseding those floor-plan-level boxes.
Section cut arrows '1' printed on this plan reference the section views on A-17 (หน้า19) — see _หน้า19_wc_section1.json / _หน้า19_wc_section2.json.
Several small fitting-label glyphs (SW./K. combined label, FD. symbol, window callouts) are at the edge of legibility at this resolution — flagged individually above rather than guessed confidently.
